title: Smoked Haddock Steamed Delight
description: A comforting German dish featuring smoked haddock that is both bitter and crunchy, suitable for Jain followers.

ingredients.name: 1 can of drained and rinsed cannellini beans
ingredients.notes: Cannellini beans provide a creamy texture

ingredients.name: 300g smoked haddock fillets
ingredients.notes: Preferably with skin to add crunchiness

ingredients.name: 1 red bell pepper, diced
ingredients.notes: For a pop of color and bitterness

instructions: Drain and rinse the cannellini beans. Pat them dry with paper towels.
Cut the smoked haddock fillets into small pieces for quicker cooking.
Heat a pan on medium-high heat, add a bit of oil if necessary, then place the drained haddock slices in the pan until they start smoking lightly.
Remove the smoked haddock from the pan and let it cool slightly. Then, mix with other ingredients like diced bell pepper and minced garlic.
Pour 3-4 tablespoons of water into a steamer pot, bring to boil, then steam the mixture for about 10 minutes until tender.
Once ready, transfer the steamed mixture to a bowl or serving dish, garnish if desired.
